.gitignore.general_idea: Replace generic Java ignore patterns with a comprehensive, IDE-agnostic .gitignore template covering Maven, STS, IntelliJ, NetBeans, and VS Code.
.gitignore.human_impl: Replaced *.class, *.log, etc. with HELP.md, target/, .idea, .vscode/, and build/ entries.

README.md.general_idea: Added a centered logo image to the README header for better visual branding.
Included CI/CD and SonarCloud quality gate badges to display project health status.
Added a dedicated section linking to external documentation hosted on docs.telemodem.cl.
README.md.human_impl:
## Documentation

The documentation is available here: [Documentation](...)

README.md.general_idea: Updated installation instructions to link to the Docker Hub image instead of just mentioning a Dockerfile.
Expanded the configuration section to include Hibernate, Flyway, XCOM, and Quartz driver details.
Documented the environment variables that can override application properties for containerized deployments.
README.md.human_impl:
The following are the defined environment variables
- APP_JDBC_DRIVER: ...
- APP_JDBC_URL: ...

README.md.general_idea: Rewrote the Basic Usage section to describe the new web-based interface and its features (Create, Schedule, Chain, Channels).
README.md.human_impl: Dagserver provides a user-friendly web-based interface accessible at http://hostname:port/...

README.md.general_idea: Updated the credentials section to reflect the new Front-End URL and corrected the GraphQL endpoint path.
Added a section explaining how to run the server as a container using a provided docker-compose.yml example.

## Run as Container

docker-compose.yml example file is provided...
